strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with concrete personal contexts.
Vivid description of learning transformations (e.g., motorbike riding) showing change in prior knowledge.
Inclusion of photographs of the actual objects to ground the exhibition in real contexts.
weaknesses: Analysis lacks precision and depth in places, with some overly long and unfocused paragraphs.
Links to the chosen IA prompt remain implicit rather than explicitly framed throughout the commentary.
Heavy reliance on anecdotal evidence without integration of TOK concepts or external references.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition meets the descriptors for the 5â6 band by clearly identifying three specific objects in recognisable real-world contexts and offering explanations of how each relates to the chosen IA prompt on personal experience shaping knowledge. The justification for each object is distinct and sustained, supported by vivid personal anecdotes and photographs. However, the analysis falls short of the next band because it lacks consistent precision, explicit reference to the IA prompt, and deeper engagement with TOK terminology and external evidence. These limitationsâoccasional repetition, informal terminology, and uneven supportâplace the work comfortably at the upper end of the 5â6 band, warranting the final score of 6.

annotations.comment: The student clearly situates the first object in a personal context, meeting the requirement for concrete real-world identification.
Links to the chosen IA prompt are only implied. The student should explicitly state the prompt and frame each discussion point around it.
Several TOK concepts (e.g. personal vs shared knowledge) could be invoked here to deepen the analysis and connect explicitly to theory.
The commentary relies heavily on anecdotal evidence; incorporating references to TOK literature or specialist perspectives would strengthen justification.
Avoid repetition of the term âexperienceâ by using synonyms or more precise qualifiers to enhance clarity and style.
Which IA prompt guides this exhibition? Clarifying this at the outset would focus the justification for each object.
Including a clear photograph of the actual badminton racket fulfills the requirement for specific real-world objects.
The second objectâs personal context (routine use of the motorbike) is well described, giving concrete real-world grounding.
The motorbike analysis remains unfocused on TOK theory; the link to the IA prompt must be made explicit in this paragraph.
Link the motorbike example to a TOK concept (e.g. paradigm shift or knowledge frameworks) to show how experience reshapes understanding.
The term âuniquityâ is unclear and possibly misspelt. Choose precise language to avoid reader confusion.
Avoid general claims of âdangerousâ without acknowledging counterclaims; this nuance deepens the TOK analysis.
How does the motorbike example complement the badminton racket in illustrating knowledge change through experience?
The description of learning features on the bike is vivid and shows transformation of prior knowledgeâgood real-world linkage.
This paragraph is overly long and contains multiple ideas; splitting it into two would improve clarity.
Explicitly tie the motorbike lesson narrative back to the IA prompt on personal experience shaping knowledge.
Phrase âif learned to use properly, are safe to useâ is awkward; revise for grammatical accuracy.
The photograph of the motorbike grounds the discussion in a specific real-world contextâgood choice.
The label â3rd Obiectâ appears without accompanying photo or context. A full third object entry is needed to complete the exhibition.
Integrate TOK-specific terms such as âknowledge claimâ or âjustificationâ when discussing the maskâs effectiveness.
The sequence between biology lessons and the COVID-19 outbreak is confusing; clarify the timeline to improve coherence.
Citing scientific studies or epidemiological data on mask efficacy would substantiate your claims and enrich the analysis.
The conclusion effectively illustrates the shift in personal experience with the mask, highlighting knowledge transformation.
The final summary reiterates prior points too closely; refine to emphasise the unique value of the mask object.
Add a clear photograph and context for the third object to fulfill the requirement of three well-justified items.
The initial discussion of the face mask captures pre-knowledge beliefs clearly, illustrating how prior experience shaped interpretation.
Links to the IA prompt remain implicit; explicitly connect mask usage to the prompt about how experience informs knowledge.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
